brief.rationale: Each channel is missing its CTA marker — should fail cta_presence only.

email.subject_b: Maya's tandoori cauliflower — early access tonight
email.body: Maya's tandoori cauliflower steak is here, {{first_name}} — and it's not asking for permission. Smoke, char, coconut-yogurt finish — the fork works overtime. Not a kit. Just dinner — already cooked.

sms.body: Hey {{first_name}} — Maya's tandoori cauliflower steak just landed. Enjoy.

push.title: Maya's cauliflower steak just landed
push.body: Dinner is ready soon for the cohort.
